description: This file contains mixins for creating caret indicators with different directions and styles, used for styling UI elements in a project.

methods.name: caret-down
methods.description: Mixin for creating a downward pointing caret with specified width.

methods.name: caret-up
methods.description: Mixin for creating an upward pointing caret with specified width.

methods.name: caret-end
methods.description: Mixin for creating a caret pointing to the end (right) with specified width.

methods.name: caret-start
methods.description: Mixin for creating a caret pointing to the start (left) with specified width.

methods.name: caret
methods.description: Main mixin that applies the appropriate caret style based on direction and other parameters.
